_comment: Copy this file to .book-forge/image-config.json (project) or ~/.config/book-forge/image-config.json (user). Fill in only the provider(s) you have. API keys can also be set via env vars (OPENAI_API_KEY, etc.) which take precedence over this file.

openai._comment: Best for covers per authorclaw testing. Strong at rendering title text.

ideogram._comment: Best at rendering text on the image. Recommended when the title must be on the cover.

google._comment: Google Imagen. Use the Gemini API key path (GOOGLE_GENAI_API_KEY) for simplest setup; Vertex AI via gcloud also works.

fal._comment: fal.ai — Flux and many models. autonovel uses this for cover art.

replicate._comment: Replicate — many models including Flux and SDXL.

comfyui._comment: Self-hosted, free. Run ComfyUI locally, point this at it. Optionally provide a workflow JSON (with parametrized CLIPTextEncode 'Positive prompt' and EmptyLatentImage nodes).
